name: Personal Schedule (per-resource bulk send)
subject: Your Schedule: {resource_name} — {project_name} ({date})
body:
Dear {resource_name},

Please find attached your personal project schedule extract for {project_name} as of {date}.

This chart shows all tasks currently assigned to you, including start dates, finish dates, and percentage completion. Please review your assignments and ensure your progress figures are up to date.

If you foresee any delays or have capacity concerns, please contact {project_manager} at your earliest convenience so the schedule can be updated accordingly.

Kind regards,
{project_manager}
body_html:
Dear {resource_name},

Below is your personal project schedule extract for {project_name} as of {date}. The chart is also attached as an SVG file for offline use.

{svg_inline}

This chart shows all tasks currently assigned to you, including start dates, finish dates, and percentage completion. Please review your assignments and ensure your progress figures are up to date.

If you foresee any delays or have capacity concerns, please contact {project_manager} at your earliest convenience so the schedule can be updated accordingly.

Kind regards,
{project_manager}
